articles.title: Yellow alert issued for heat in Mumbai, Palghar over next 4 days | Konkan and Western Ghats likely to see rain | Inshorts - Inshorts
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Maharashtra
articles.full_text: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a yellow alert for Mumbai, Thane, Palghar and Raigad districts of Maharashtra over the next four days, forecasting hot and humid conditions. In the next 48-hour period, the maximum and minimum temperatures are likely to be between 27 and 35°C. Dry conditions are also expected on Sunday in Mumbai Metropolitan Region.
